content_data.title: Architecture Program Review
body: Original source deck establishes palette, fonts, and placeholder geometry.
This deck exists only to seed a reusable theme contract.
The extracted master should flow into derivative stakeholder decks.

content_data.title: Source Slide 2
body: Visual hierarchy is designed for management briefings.
Text density is moderate and favors compact bullets.
The downstream deck should inherit this structure.

content_data.title: Derivative Deck: Operating Decisions
body: This deck was rendered from content merged onto an extracted master theme.
The source PowerPoint determined palette, placeholder layout, and fonts.
It demonstrates a local-only pattern for native Office theme reuse.

content_data.title: Board Actions
body: Approve sample portfolio for Media-Actuator operators.
Promote extracted PPTX theme flow to reusable procedure status.
Extend the same bridge to DOCX and XLSX style extraction later.
